content: TASK-034 interrupt done: larger 2D icons no longer share the same horizontal center as labels. Nodes with provider/kind metadata reserve extra width during layout, and single-icon SVG labels are centered in the text area to the right of the icon. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
